title: Behaviors
scope: User-customizable if/then behavior rules, stored per user and unconditionally injected into every chat system prompt — so they reliably steer the assistant ('when I say I started my truck, mark the matching auto maintenance item done'). NOT event-driven automations (the Automation app); these are prompt-injected rules the chat agent follows in conversation.

specs.title: Add a behavior
specs.behavior: Adding a behavior records an if/then rule — a trigger description and an action description, with scope and notes — that is injected into the chat system prompt.

specs.title: List behaviors
specs.behavior: Listing returns the user's behavior rules, optionally filtered by scope.

specs.title: Update a behavior
specs.behavior: Updating changes a rule's trigger, action, or notes.

specs.title: Toggle a behavior
specs.behavior: Toggling enables or disables a rule without deleting it, so it stops (or resumes) being injected into the prompt.

specs.title: Remove a behavior
specs.behavior: Removing permanently deletes a behavior rule.
